mapper.select: SELECT value FROM metric_data_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND metric_code = #{metricCode} AND collect_time >= now() - make_interval(mins => #{windowMinutes}) ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT value FROM metric_data_1h WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND metric_code = #{metricCode} AND collect_time >= now() - make_interval(hours => #{windowHours}) ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT value FROM metric_data_1d WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND metric_code = #{metricCode} AND collect_time >= now() - make_interval(days => #{windowDays}) ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT value FROM metric_data_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND metric_code = #{metricCode} AND collect_time >= now() - make_interval(mins => #{offsetMinutes} + #{toleranceMinutes}) AND collect_time <= now() - make_interval(mins => #{offsetMinutes} - #{toleranceMinutes}) ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT value FROM metric_data_1h WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND metric_code = #{metricCode} AND collect_time >= now() - make_interval(mins => #{offsetMinutes} + #{toleranceMinutes}) AND collect_time <= now() - make_interval(mins => #{offsetMinutes} - #{toleranceMinutes}) ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT value FROM metric_data_1d WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND metric_code = #{metricCode} AND collect_time >= now() - make_interval(mins => #{offsetMinutes} + #{toleranceMinutes}) AND collect_time <= now() - make_interval(mins => #{offsetMinutes} - #{toleranceMinutes}) ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
